signals.headline: Solana On-Chain Economic Activity Hits $1
signals.raw:
Solana On-Chain Economic Activity Hits $1.1 Trillion in Q1 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Solana's network achieved a record $1.1 trillion in total economic activity for Q1 2026, up 6,558.6% from the prior quarter, driven by surges in transactions, DeFi, and staking—this milestone was reported today (14 April 2026) and signals strong adoption amid price volatility around $84.[2]
